content: Backend: ACCRED_TTL = 24h, refresh expires_at on every request
Backend: QR code encodes /classified-vault?code=X URL (not plain number)
Backend: Public response strips accreditation_number from terminal API
Frontend: TerminalPopup hides accred number, CTA → /classified-vault (no prefilled code)
i18n: update terminal copy to focus on 'check your inbox'
Test full flow: submit email → terminal hides number → email arrives → 24h TTL → QR/link works
